facts: 134+ US monthly macro series 1959-present; published regime shifts (GFC, COVID, ZLB).
hypotheses: {pre-2008, 2008-2020, post-2020} are three distinct environments rather than two with COVID as a transient.
Vintage-as-environment (released-by date) is categorically different from measurement-date-as-environment.
intuitions: Goulet Coulombe 2022 / Medeiros 2021 extended to post-2024 data.
Nowcasting literature using ALFRED vintage archive.
unknowns: 'Regime' as a primitive — discrete latent state vs continuous latent variable — is something the data does not commit to but every method does; there is no established formal name for it.
